title: Create base esp32_lichen Renode platform files
description: Modeled exactly after esp32s3_lichen. Adjust for classic ESP32 (Xtensa LX6 cpuType? different memory map, UART at 0x3f400000?, SPI addresses, EFUSE, boot tags). Include .repl with memory regions, CPU, UART, SPI proxy, sysbus tags. .resc to load it. README.md. Do not touch other files.
close_reason: Base esp32_lichen Renode platform files created and verified to load. CPU, memory map, UART@0x3ff40000, SPI3, sysbus tags, EFUSE/boot straps modeled after esp32s3_lichen with ESP32 adjustments. SX1276 peripheral included in base. Tests via Renode load succeeded. Only touched the 3 new files.
